name: trendfinder
description: Turn TikTok/Instagram trend data into content decisions inside Cowork, connecting to your Trendfinder data backend (trends, velocity, avatars/DNA, scrape schedules) with an avatar-first onboarding — the user describes an avatar (brand + persona + DNA), Claude derives its niche(s) and scrape topics with AI so nobody ever hand-types a hashtag, and 24/7 schedules remain an optional add-on — while the avatar-studio skill edits and lists existing avatars, the script-studio skill generates hooks + short-video scripts in an avatar voice matched to trends natively in Claude (steerable by goal: Reichweite/viral, Engagement, Verkauf, Follower, Vertrauen), and the Trendfinder-Cockpit renders as a Live Artifact with Trends and Avatare tabs, with all AI synthesis (briefings, scripts, cluster labels, avatar DNA, scrape topics) happening natively in Claude — the backend only stores and scrapes.
